series_metadata.series_description: This file contains documents generally associated with all boat registrations issued by the Division of Parks and Watercraft to document ownership and type of boat, including but not limited to: registration applications, documents supporting the registration applications, registration forms, registrations, transfer/renewal/duplicate requests, electronic renewals and registrations returned as undeliverable.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for 2 years after the State-wide financial statement audit and the Agency/Departmental-wide audit are conducted by the State Auditor, unless they are scanned and saved in an electronic format. After these documents are scanned and saved in an electronic format, the paper copy may be destroyed. ; Electronic: Retain for 2 years after the State-wide financial statement audit and Agency/Department-wide audit are conducted by the State Auditor, then delete., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
